case_title: ANNETTE JOSEPH VS. IMPARK PACIFIC PARKING, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-03-2023 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION *PER NOV-03-23 ORDER* (TRANSACTION ID # 210053801) FILED BY INTERVENOR MARRIOTT INTERNATIONAL AS TO DEFENDANT IN INTERVENTION IMPARK PACIFIC PARKING, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100194647) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOSEPH, ANNETTE SERVED MAR-22-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT IMPARK PACIFIC PARKING, LLC
